title: Joe and Michael Reconnect
summary: Joe advised Michael on approaching website development in two phases: a quick refresh for Vinnie and a strategic buildout for Michael's infrastructure plan, suggesting focusing on five core page examples for Vinnie by Friday to secure quick wins. Michael expressed frustration over workload and being a one-person marketing team, while highlighting website complexity and the mismatch between current tasks and VP of Marketing responsibilities.

decisions.description: Michael Donovan will approach website development in two phases: a quick refresh for Vinnie and a strategic buildout for Michael's infrastructure plan.
Michael Donovan will focus on creating five core new pages or refreshes by Friday, anchored to the 11-page PowerPoint Vinnie had sent.
Joe Furnari will respond to the email about Vinnie's comments later tonight.
Joe Furnari and Michael Donovan will position a call with Vinnie on Monday, or whatever day they are available, after Michael Donovan has created the pages.

actionItems.task: Create five new pages by Friday, or at least one or two pages, and send examples/ideas to Joe Furnari.

expectedOutcome.description: Completed draft pages sent to Joe for review and feedback.

tensions: Michael's frustration with being a one-person marketing team and the disconnect between his role and responsibilities.
Michael's concerns about Vinnie's use of ChatGPT and the impact on communication.
Michael's frustration over the complexity and bloat of the existing website and the need for a refresh.
The debate over whether the immediate task is a 'refresh' or a 'new website'.
Michael's feeling of being attacked and unsupported.
referencesToPast: Previous instances of Michael building websites for Strolid and Stral AI without compensation.
A conversation in March/April where Joe was worried about Michael doing too much.
The offsite meeting where Michael was mocked after Joe stepped out.
A marketing plan document reviewed the prior week.
Previous disagreement related to underperforming hire.
